title: Enforce Pod Security Standards with Namespace Labels — Add labels to existing namespaces withkubectl label
text:
It is helpful to apply the
--dry-run
flag when initially evaluating security profile changes for
namespaces. The Pod Security Standard checks will still be run in
dry run
mode, giving you
information about how the new policy would treat existing pods, without actually updating a policy.
kubectl label --dry-run
=
server --overwrite ns --all
\
pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce
=
baseline
